text: How many active listings do you have?
Which channels are you using? For example: Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, direct bookings, or others?
When are you hoping to go live with Guesty? Are you aiming to start as soon as possible, in 2–4 weeks, in 1–2 months, or are you still exploring?

args.note: Required field 'go_live' deferred by user — needs Call-1 resolution.

text: How do you handle cleaning — is it done in-house by your own team, through a cleaning company, via a marketplace app like Turno, or a mix?
For your turnover checklist: would you like to upload your own, use a Guesty template, or skip for now?
Do you use smart locks? If so, which system?
For your revenue analytics, should Guesty recognize revenue on the check-in date, the check-out date, or prorated across the stay?
Could you clarify — check-in date, check-out date, or prorated?
Do you offer a non-refundable rate option — where guests pay less but can't cancel? (I'll note your answer and flag it for your onboarding specialist Jordan to configure.)
For security on bookings: do you use Guesty's Damage Protection (Shield), collect a standard security deposit, a damage waiver, or none?
Could you clarify — damage protection, security deposit, damage waiver, or none?
When do you collect payment from guests — at the time of booking, closer to arrival, or split into two payments?
Are there any mandatory fees you charge all guests — like a late check-out fee, pet fee, or laundry fee? Note: per-property cleaning fees are handled separately. If none, just say 'none'.
Just to confirm — a I have a cleaning fee of . of 85.0 (flat). Is that right?

args.fee_type: I have a cleaning fee of .

text: Any other mandatory fees, or are we done with fees?

What taxes do you collect on reservations? For example, occupancy tax, city tax, sales tax, VAT, or GST? I'll capture exactly what you tell me and flag it for Jordan — we never configure taxes without specialist review.
Is this tax included in the price (inclusive) or added on top (exclusive)?

args.reason: User has no taxes to configure

text: Who will be the decision-maker for the Guesty setup — just you, or will you have teammates to invite?

What are your top 1–3 priorities you want to cover on the first call with Jordan? Options: pricing strategy, channel mix, guest messaging, cleaner workflows, accounting setup, owner reporting, booking website, or reviews/reputation.
Could you clarify — your top priorities (up to 3)?
What's the biggest challenge you're trying to solve with Guesty — in your own words?

args.value: My owners always ask me for their money breakdown and I do it by hand.

text: How does your portfolio work — do you own all the properties yourself, do you manage properties on behalf of other owners, or is it a mix of both?
How many property owners do you manage on behalf of? (Give me a number and we'll go through each one.)
Let's capture owner 1. What's their full name?
What's Maria Chen.'s email address?
Which of your listings does Maria Chen. manage? (names or 'all')
What percentage ownership share does Maria Chen. hold, if any? (Or say 'skip' if not applicable.)
How do you get paid for managing Maria Chen.'s properties — a percentage commission, a flat monthly fee, a revenue split, or other?
What's your commission rate for Maria Chen.'s properties? (e.g. '15%')
Just to confirm — 200.0% commission rate. Is that right?
I want to make sure I get this right: 200.0% commission rate. Can you confirm?

args.user_quote: No, it's a flat fee of $200. It's not a commission rate.
args.note: Could not confirm echo for 'owners'. Flagged for Jordan.
